top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Women and leadership: widening the pipeline
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: New concierge service and visa scheme unveiled to help Britain’s fastest-growing firms scale and attract talent
top_signals.summary: Concierge service for business launched as part of mission to bring about the UK's first trillion-dollar firm.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Palantir's Karp says businesses are 'unhappy' with the frontier AI labs
top_signals.summary: Palantir CEO Alex Karp says AI will drive the most important political decisions in the U.S. and shouldn't be decided by party lines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Blackstone to Back Two Sigma Veteran’s Quant Hedge Fund Startup
top_signals.summary: Jinger Zhao, a former Two Sigma Investments managing director who spent 18 years at the asset manager, is preparing to start her own Asia-focused hedge fund with initial backing from Blackstone Inc.

top_signals.title: KPMG’s Summer friday half-day rollback signals deeper woes for Big Four giants
top_signals.summary: Big Four giant KPMG’s removal of its Friday early finish for employees is affecting branding and souring the mood among staff, who may see this as a signal to reconsider a career at the firm.  Time spent working at a Big Four giant was once a prized bauble to list on a CV.
